name: KATASHIRO

abilities.name: Blade Rush
abilities.text: While resolving the Charge action, this model may move through enemy models. Deal 1 damage to enemy models moved through this way.

abilities.name: Demise (Torn Up)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, enemy models within (melee)1" of this model are dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Paper Blizzard
actions.effects: Target must remove an enemy Scheme marker within 1" of itself. If it cannot, this action deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Marked
triggers.text: The target gains an Adversary token.

actions.name: Summoner's Call
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Place this model in base contact with a friendly Minako Rei, ignoring LoS.
actions.effects: Then, enemy models within (aura)1" of this model must pass a TN 12 Df duel or be dealt 1 damage.

extraction_notes: Characteristics listed at bottom: 'Minion (2), Construct, Versatile' - where (2) indicates model_limit of 2
No keywords appear after diamond bullet in characteristics line
